mapper.sql: SELECT PHOTO_NO, MINIHOME_NO, FOLDER_NO, PHOTO_ONAME, PHOTO_RNAME, PHOTO_URL, PHOTO_TITLE, PHOTO_COMMENT, PHOTO_DATE, PHOTO_M_DATE, PHOTO_VIEW, PHOTO_STATUS, REPORT_CODE, PHOTO_REPORT FROM PHOTO WHERE PHOTO_STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT R_NO, PHOTO_NO, R_WRITERID, R_COMMENT, R_DATE, R_M_DATE, R_STATUS FROM PHOTO_REPLY WHERE R_STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT P.PHOTO_NO, P.MINIHOME_NO , P.FOLDER_NO , P.PHOTO_ONAME , P.PHOTO_RNAME , P.PHOTO_URL , P.PHOTO_TITLE , P.PHOTO_COMMENT , P.PHOTO_DATE , P.PHOTO_M_DATE , P.PHOTO_VIEW , P.PHOTO_STATUS , P.PHOTO_REPORT FROM PHOTO P JOIN PHOTO_REPLY R ON (P.PHOTO_NO = R.PHOTO_NO) AND MINIHOME_NO = #{minihomeNo} GROUP BY P.PHOTO_NO ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 3
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PHOTO( PHOTO_NO, MINIHOME_NO, FOLDER_NO, PHOTO_ONAME, PHOTO_RNAME, PHOTO_URL, PHOTO_TITLE, PHOTO_COMMENT, PHOTO_DATE, PHOTO_M_DATE, PHOTO_VIEW, PHOTO_STATUS, REPORT_CODE, PHOTO_REPORT )VALUES( (SELECT NEXTVAL('photo_seq') FROM DUAL), #{minihomeNo}, 0, #{Oname}, #{Rname}, #{url}, #{title}, #{comment}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
mapper.update: UPDATE PHOTO SET PHOTO_TITLE= #{title}, PHOTO_COMMENT=#{comment}, PHOTO_ONAME= #{Oname}, PHOTO_RNAME= #{Rname}, PHOTO_URL = #{url}, PHOTO_M_DATE = DEFAULT WHERE PHOTO_STATUS = 'Y' AND PHOTO_NO = #{no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PHOTO_REPLY(R_NO, PHOTO_NO, R_WRITERID, R_COMMENT, R_DATE, R_M_DATE, R_STATUS) VALUES((SELECT NEXTVAL('photo_reply_seq') FROM DUAL), #{photoNo}, #{writerId}, #{comment}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT );
mapper.select: SELECT MINIHOME_NO, USER_NO, PROFILE, INTRO, MOOD, MBTI, MINIROOM, MH_ACCESS, THEME FROM MINIHOME WHERE MINIHOME_NO = #{minihomeNo}
